description: Add Upstage Document OCR (primary) + Gemini multimodal alongside the existing Codex OCR. User can choose the provider from the top-right of the 말소 입력 screen. README rewritten for a quick interviewer evaluation (live URL at the top, English).

steps.name: ocr-service-providers
steps.summary: providers/{codex,upstage,gemini}.py — shared interface; extract.py dispatches by provider; /extract accepts provider form field (default upstage); /health reports per-provider readiness

steps.name: backend-provider-passthrough
steps.summary: POST /api/malso accepts multipart provider field; ocr.extract(buf, name, provider) extended; upload response carries ocrProvider; vehicles.raw_ocr stores it for the record

steps.name: frontend-provider-selector
steps.summary: MalsoInputPage 우측 상단 selector (Upstage default + top, Codex, Gemini); localStorage persistence; FormData carries provider; provider name surfaces in the OCR result banner

steps.name: deploy-and-readme
steps.summary: render.yaml: UPSTAGE_API_KEY / GEMINI_API_KEY (sync:false); README rewritten interviewer-first (live URL + 30-sec demo + Upstage integration architecture in English)
